headline: Regions Bank Announces New Leaders in Key Markets to Drive Business Growth and Customer Experience
summary: ATLANTA, June 23, 2026--These executive leadership roles will further strengthen Regions Bank's growth in serving vibrant markets across the Southeast, Texas, and beyond.
